title: Todo lo que no sé
overview: At 35, Laura leads a monotonous life between work, caring for her father,and an unstable relationship.Everything changes when a former colleague offers her the chance to revive a tech project. She decides to try, prioritizing herself for the first time in a long time, but her choices shake her world.
